tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: Search for patterns, symbols, or text across the project codebase. Respects .gitignore. Returns matching file paths and snippets.

query.description: The pattern or text to search for

filePattern.description: Optional glob pattern to limit search (e.g. "*.ts", "src/**/*.py")

tools.name: get_project_structure
tools.description: Returns an annotated file tree of the project (respects .gitignore, skips node_modules/build/dist). Useful for understanding project layout before making changes.

path.description: Subdirectory to start from (default: project root)

tools.name: get_conventions
tools.description: Returns the detected coding conventions for this project: naming rules, file structure, testing patterns, forbidden practices.

tools.name: get_stack_info
tools.description: Returns the complete tech stack inventory: languages, frameworks, key dependencies, build tools, and test setup.

tools.name: get_file_summary
tools.description: Returns a structured summary of a specific file: key exports, types, functions, and brief description. Token-efficient alternative to reading the full file.

filePath.description: Path to the file relative to project root

tools.name: get_env_vars
tools.description: Returns all required environment variable names (from .env.example or code). Shows which are set vs. missing. Never returns values.

tools.name: get_package_info
tools.description: Returns installed package versions and direct dependencies. Useful before suggesting library usage to avoid API mismatch.

packageName.description: Optional: specific package to look up (e.g. "@trpc/server")

tools.name: get_impact_of_change
tools.description: Shows what files are affected when a given file changes. Returns direct importers and all transitively affected files.

filePath.description: File path relative to project root (e.g. "src/types.ts")

tools.name: get_dependency_chain
tools.description: Shows the full dependency chain for a file: what it imports and what imports it, with export names.

filePath.description: File path relative to project root (e.g. "src/utils/auth.ts")

tools.name: check_for_updates
tools.description: Checks if the AI OS artifacts installed in this repo are out of date. Returns update instructions when a newer version of AI OS is available.

tools.name: get_memory_guidelines
tools.description: Returns repository memory rules and memory usage protocol from .ai-os/context/memory.md.

tools.name: get_repo_memory
tools.description: Retrieves persisted repository memory entries from .ai-os/memory/memory.jsonl, optionally filtered by query/category.

category.description: Optional category filter (e.g. architecture, conventions, pitfalls)

tools.name: remember_repo_fact
tools.description: Appends a durable repository memory entry to .ai-os/memory/memory.jsonl for future agent sessions.

category.description: Category (e.g. conventions, architecture, build, testing, security)
